extension.summary: Skip intros, show the next-episode prompt, and get Stinger alerts for movie post-credits scenes.
extension.description: Adds three lightweight playback helpers to Kodi: Skip Intro, Next On, and Stinger. The add-on can use online metadata from TheIntroDB, IntroDB.app, TMDB, AfterCredits.com, and Wikipedia, fall back to local chapter markers when needed, and optionally use manual timing settings for intro skipping. It keeps the on-screen experience minimal with simple overlay buttons.
